title: Data Security & DLP Analyst
description: About The JobAt Alignerr, we partner with the worlds leading AI research teams and labs to build and train cutting-edge AI models.Were looking for people who understand how data leaks actually happen. You will work with realistic incidents and controls to model how sensitive information is exposed, detected, and protected across modern organizations.Organization Alignerr Position Data Security & DLP Analyst Type Contract / Task-Based Compensation $38$60 /hour Location Remote Commitment 1040 hour
